---
title: "Core Concepts in Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation"
description: "Synthesis note on recurring concepts in Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation."
book_id: "essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Synthesis"
citation_key: "patton_2012_essentials_utilization_focused_evaluation"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation:ch-introduction-overview-and-context:c0007"
  - "chunk:essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation:ch-introduction-overview-and-context:c0027"
  - "chunk:essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation:step10-step-10-negotiate-appropriate-methods-to-generate-credible-findings-that-support:c0005"
source_status: "needs_review"
---
## Source

This synthesis draws across the generated notes for *Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation* [@patton_2012_essentials_utilization_focused_evaluation].

## Central Logic

Utilization-focused evaluation judges design quality by whether intended users can and will use the process and findings.

## Concepts

- Primary intended users: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Primary intended uses: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Situation analysis: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Process use: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Methods negotiation: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.
- Findings use: a recurring idea used to frame evaluation design, evidence collection, interpretation, or use in this book.

## Links

- [Utilization-Focused Evaluation Overview](section-01-utilization-focused-overview.qmd)
- [The 17-Step Utilization-Focused Checklist](section-02-seventeen-steps.qmd)
- [Negotiating Methods for Intended Use](section-03-methods-for-use.qmd)

## References
